prompt: Say: I am reading a short story now.
correctAnswer: Sto leggendo un racconto breve adesso.

prompt: Say: Yesterday I studied for two hours.
correctAnswer: Ieri ho studiato per due ore.

prompt: Say: Tomorrow I will practice with my friend.
correctAnswer: Domani mi eserciterò con il mio amico.
hints: Pay attention to the sentence structure.

prompt: Say: If I have time, I will review the lesson.
correctAnswer: Se ho tempo, ripasserò la lezione.
hints: Pay attention to the sentence structure.

prompt: Say: I have been studying Italian for six months.
hints: Notice the tense or modal used.

prompt: Say: I would travel more if flights were cheaper.
correctAnswer: Viaggerei di più se i voli fossero più economici.
hints: Notice the tense or modal used.

prompt: Say: By the time we arrive, they will have finished dinner.
correctAnswer: Quando arriveremo, avranno già finito di cenare.
hints: Focus on natural phrasing and word order.

prompt: Say: Had I known earlier, I would have changed the plan.
correctAnswer: Se lo avessi saputo prima, avrei cambiato il piano.
hints: Focus on natural phrasing and word order.

prompt: Say: Every morning I write three new words.
correctAnswer: Ogni mattina scrivo tre parole nuove.

prompt: Say: We were cooking when the guests arrived.
correctAnswer: Stavamo cucinando quando sono arrivati gli ospiti.
hints: Pay attention to the sentence structure.

prompt: Say: I had already left when the message arrived.
correctAnswer: Me n'ero già andato quando è arrivato il messaggio.
hints: Notice the tense or modal used.

prompt: Say: If I had practiced more, I would be more confident now.
correctAnswer: Se avessi praticato di più, adesso sarei più sicuro.
hints: Focus on natural phrasing and word order.
